AI Engineer - Palantir Foundry & AIP at [CSX](https://www.linkedin.com/company/csx-transportation)
...
I am an AI Engineer and Data Platform Builder focused on transforming enterprise data into intelligent systems that power real-world decision making. With 8+ years of experience across AI Engineering, Data Science, and Data Engineering, I design and deploy scalable AI-driven platforms that integrate data, machine learning, and operational workflows. My work focuses on building AI-enabled data products, intelligent analytics platforms, and decision-support systems that deliver measurable business impact. I specialize in building enterprise data platforms and operational AI systems, where governed data pipelines, semantic models, and machine learning workflows come together to support complex business operations. My work includes designing and deploying: • Ontology-driven data models and operational data products • Scalable PySpark and distributed data pipelines • AI-ready and ML-ready datasets for predictive analytics and anomaly detection • LLM and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures integrating enterprise data with vector search • Agentic AI workflows supporting automated reasoning and decision support • LLM-powered analytics services using FastAPI and containerized inference pipelines • Operational dashboards and decision-support applications for business teams I have experience building AI solutions across supply chain, logistics, manufacturing, and generative AI platforms, where data and machine learning directly improve operational efficiency and strategic decision-making. My work often sits at the intersection of AI engineering, data platforms, and enterprise operations, where scalable architecture, data governance, and production reliability are essential. Technologies I frequently work with include: Python, PySpark, SQL, distributed data systems, LLM architectures, RAG pipelines, FastAPI, Docker, vector databases, and modern cloud data platforms. I am particularly interested in building enterprise AI platforms, operational intelligence systems, and next-generation AI-enabled decision infrastructure.

I enjoyed sharing insights into CSX Transportation Intermodal AI-powered solution SOPHIA at the NVIDIA booth during this year's Microsoft Ignite 2024. We discussed how we’re using computer vision and AI to validate equipment leaving the terminal, including bobtails, containers on chassis, chassis, and trailers. # Data Scientist I
...
The Data Scientist I – Reliability and Maintenance Planning supports reliability, maintenance planning, and operational decision-making across Fleet and Equipment at TTX.
...
This role focuses on developing statistical and machine learning models to improve component reliability, optimize maintenance strategies, and enhance fleet performance. The position works with complex operational datasets (e.g., detector, movement, and billing data) and partners closely with Fleet, Engineering, Supply Chain, and other business stakeholders.
...
While the primary focus is reliability analytics, the role will also gain exposure to modern analytics platforms including Microsoft Fabric, Power Platform, and other AI-enabled solutions as part of TTX’s evolving data ecosystem.

results.title: Data Scientist – Career Services
highlights:
Data Scientist – Career Services
...
# Data Scientist
...
Every freight train that arrives on time and every passenger trip that ends safely depends on people, equipment, and data working together. At Wi‑Tronix, the models you train here will run on real locomotives in real time, helping crews and customers avoid the incidents that never make the news. We are hiring a Data Scientist who wants their models to leave the notebook and live on the rail.
...
Wi‑Tronix is the digital platform the rail industry turns to for real‑time IoT data, AI‑powered analytics, and intelligent video. This is not a typical SaaS environment, and it is not a research lab. Our work is connected to critical infrastructure, our 2026 AI roadmap is funded and shared across the company, and quality is a standard we hold each other to.
...
You will own the full lifecycle of deep learning models that run on locomotives across North America, working with real video and sensor data and shipping to edge hardware where lighting, weather, and equipment variability are constant factors.
...
• Design and train custom deep neural networks for computer vision, object detection, and time series problems
...
• Build and refine the labeling and training pipelines that feed model development
...
• Optimize models for edge deployment using PyTorch, NVIDIA TensorRT, and ONNX
...
• Create the APIs and automated testing that move models into production and keep them healthy
...
• Partner with ML engineers, data engineers, and product, and translate model behavior for non‑technical stakeholders
...
a leaderboard.
...
• BS or MS in Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field
...
• 3+ years building and deploying deep learning models on real data, with strong Python and PyTorch fluency required
...
• Computer vision fundamentals, SQL for data access, and experience with regression, classification, and object detection
...
• Solid foundation in memory model, CPU and GPU architectures, and modular software design; comfort with AWS S3 and Glue
...
• Agile mindset comfortable with rapid prototyping, feedback loops, and shipping work the team can act on
...
• NVIDIA TensorRT, ONNX, YOLO or Detectron2, C or C++ for edge integration, Docker, IoT or safety critical background
...
A specific and real mission with locomotive video and sensor data nobody else has access to. Full lifecycle ownership, a named career path to Senior Data Scientist, Principal Data Scientist, and AI Manager, and benefits that back your whole life: medical, dental, and vision with HSA (employer contribution), employer-paid life, AD&D, and disability coverage, 24/7 telemedicine, an Employee Assistance Program, and financial wellness resources.

...
I am a data and business intelligence professional who builds systems that turn raw data into growth, retention, and competitive advantage. I bring a mix of hands-on technical skills and strategic vision, with experience in SQL, Tableau, Power BI, Python, and modern data ecosystems. At CSX, I created and led the Market Research and Intelligence function, developing dashboards and models that managed portfolios of more than $100M and recovered $10M in revenue. My work has spanned transportation, logistics, and B2B, where I have used predictive analytics, AI workflows, and business intelligence tools to reduce churn, unlock growth, and sharpen positioning. I thrive in roles where I can move between the details and the big picture. I can write complex SQL queries and build BI dashboards, while also framing insights that guide executive decision-making. My approach is practical and focused on measurable results, from revenue lift to portfolio growth. I am open to Senior Analyst and Manager roles in BI, Data, and Market Intelligence, ideally in transportation, B2B, and AI-focused firms. Remote is preferred, with relocation considered for Jacksonville, Tampa, Nashville, or Washington DC. Let’s connect if you are building the future of business intelligence.

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...

results.title: Venkat Nikhil K
highlights:
Gen AI Engineer
...
Senior Gen AI Engineer and Lead engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, building, and optimizing LLM-enabled data platforms across AWS, GCP, Azure, and Snowflake environments. Strong expertise in Big Data ecosystems including Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Kafka, Airflow, and dbt, with a focus on building AI/LLM-ready data architectures. Proven experience developing end-to-end ELT/ETL pipelines for structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data, enabling Generative AI, RAG-based analytics, and intelligent data applications at enterprise scale. Hands-on experience with Snowflake data warehousing, including Snowpipe, Streams, Tasks, performance tuning, cost optimization, data governance, and secure data access for AI workloads. Advanced proficiency in Python, PySpark, SQL, and Unix scripting, with experience building LLM-integrated pipelines, AI-driven validation frameworks, and intelligent automation workflows. Extensive experience with workflow orchestration using Apache Airflow, Cloud Composer, and dbt Cloud, supporting AI-driven data processing and real-time analytics. Collaborated with data scientists to productionize AI/ML models and enable LLM-powered applications, supporting both real-time and batch inference pipelines. Expertise in data ingestion from RDBMS, APIs, and streaming platforms using Kafka, Sqoop, Flume, and Pub/Sub, building event-driven architectures for AI and LLM use cases. Experience building real-time and batch processing pipelines using Spark, Dataflow, and Kafka Streams, enabling low-latency data delivery for AI/LLM systems. Strong understanding of data quality, governance, and AI-ready validation frameworks, ensuring reliable and audit-compliant datasets. Built and optimized data pipelines to support AI/ML and LLM workloads, ensuring high-quality, scalable, and low-latency feature delivery. Proven ability to collaborate with business stakeholders, offshore teams, and cross-functional engineering teams to deliver AI-enabled and Agentic AI-driven data solutions, leveraging Python, AWS Bedrock, LangChain, LangGraph, and prompt engineering. Experience across healthcare, finance, insurance, life sciences, and ad-tech domains, delivering LLM-integrated data platforms and Agentic AI workflows supporting advanced analytics and intelligent data applications.

highlights:
Data Scientist at CrowdStrike - United States Remote

🤖 Artificial Intelligence

Cybersecurity • SaaS • Artificial Intelligence
...
CrowdStrike is a cybersecurity company that provides cloud-based security services to stop breaches. It is recognized as a leader in endpoint protection, identity and cloud security, and managed detection and response. CrowdStrike's platform, Falcon, integrates artificial intelligence to offer real-time visibility, detection, and protection against sophisticated cyber threats. The company is lauded for its effectiveness in securing networks and data, making it a trusted partner for businesses worldwide.
...
# Data Scientist
...
🇺🇸 United States –
...
🤖 Artificial Intelligence
...
CrowdStrike is a cybersecurity company that provides cloud-based security services to stop breaches. It is recognized as a leader in endpoint protection, identity and cloud security, and managed detection and response. CrowdStrike's platform, Falcon, integrates artificial intelligence to offer real-time visibility, detection, and protection against sophisticated cyber threats. The company is lauded for its effectiveness in securing networks and data, making it a trusted partner for businesses worldwide.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Work at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence and Threat Research • Work closely with subject-matter experts in cybersecurity to understand analyst workflows and their security operations procedures • Post-train LLMs and agents — supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning (RLHF/RLAIF, PPO/GRPO/DPO, reward modeling) — to automate analyst procedures and improve reliability on real security tasks • Devise AI agents and combine them into increasingly complex workflows: planning and reasoning loops, tool and function calling, and retrieval and memory • Research new approaches to agentic planning, and prototype state-of-the-art methods from the literature • Establish objective criteria for benchmarking agentic systems — evals, LLM-as-judge pipelines, and trajectory-level metrics, with real statistical rigor • Optimize prompts and inference to get the most out of every model • Collaborate and coordinate across Engineering, Data Science, and Managed Services teams, and partner with engineers to take prototypes toward production • Keep track of developments in the field of Artificial Intelligence and help identify, define, and prioritize areas for research
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Excellent foundations in machine learning, probability, and statistics, with sound instincts for uncertainty, statistical skew/variance, and experimental design • PhD-level depth of understanding in modern machine learning research —a doctorate itself is not required, but we expect equivalent mastery, including the ability to read, critique, implement, and improve upon current papers • Experience training generative models, with a strong command of LLM training fundamentals (architecture, optimization, tokenization, data, and scaling behavior) • Reinforcement learning / post-training as a core skill: RLHF/RLAIF, policy optimization (PPO/GRPO/DPO), reward modeling, and building RL environments for agents • Experience building agentic systems: agent architectures (ReAct, planning, reflection), tool and function calling, and retrieval/memory/context management • Experience with systematic prompt optimization, and with designing and building evals for LLM systems • Fluency with GPUs, PyTorch, and the common LLM training and serving stack (e.g., Hugging Face Transformers/TRL/PEFT, DeepSpeed/FSDP, vLLM/TGI/SGLang) • Strong, reproducible research engineering: clean Python and disciplined experiment tracking that your collaborators can build on • Ability to work independently on ambiguous and complex objectives, and to communicate clearly within a large project team
